mapper.insert: INSERT INTO priority_config(user_id, urgency_weight, importance_weight, deadline_weight, duration_weight, history_weight) VALUES(#{userId}, #{urgencyWeight}, #{importanceWeight}, #{deadlineWeight}, #{durationWeight}, #{historyWeight})
mapper.update: UPDATE priority_config SET urgency_weight=#{urgencyWeight}, importance_weight=#{importanceWeight}, deadline_weight=#{deadlineWeight}, duration_weight=#{durationWeight}, history_weight=#{historyWeight} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
